scripts.start: concurrently -n portal,drs,ido,passkey,passkey-only,webauthn -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "npm run dev -w shopping-portal" "npm run dev -w shopping-app" "npm run dev -w shopping-app-ido" "npm run dev -w shopping-app-passkey" "npm run dev -w shopping-app-passkey-only" "npm run dev -w webauthn-me-clone"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shopping-portal && npm run build -w shopping-app && npm run build -w shopping-app-ido && npm run build -w shopping-app-passkey && npm run build -w shopping-app-passkey-only && npm run build -w webauthn-me-clone
